raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta es nit to Rabbagun
hstischanas deht/ un to Beh-
u Waideschanas deht zel-
ohs/ fakka tas KUNGS:
likfchu winnu Glabbjunâ
tti to/ kas winnam Walgus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Ta KUNGA Walloda irr
kihsta Walloda/ ka Sudrabs
ahlu Tranka kausfehts un fep-
kahrt fchkihstihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Tu ak KUNGS gribbe-
tohs pasargabt/ tu gribbetu
paglabbaht preeksch fcho Rad-
muhshigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tee Besdeewigee wasa-
s wissapkahrt / kad Netikli
p pa-augstinati starp Zilweku
ehrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XIII. Dseesma.
weena firdiga Euhdsechana pahr leclahm
Sirđs Jsbailehm : 2/ 3. Peh; weena Luhg-
chana par Paklaufsichanu : 4. Un ka Deews
ohs Eenaidneekus norenideht : 5. Bet
wiꞥnam palihdfehtgribketu . 6/ 7.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eena Dahwida Dseef-
ima preeksch ta augsta
Dseedataja.
2. Zik ilgi ak KUNGS! tu
nnnis itt wiffai aismirfizi?
ilgt gribbi tu tavvu Walgu
eeksch mannim apslehpt?
3. Zik ilgt buhs man Padoh-
i mefleht fawâ Dwehfele / un
vá Sirđi ifDeenas bailotees?
ilgt pa-augstinasees mans
naidneeks pahr mannim?
4. Skattajs paklaust man-
s ak KUNGS! mans Deews/
gaitino mannas Azzis/ ka es
ahwê ne aismeegu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka mans Genaidneeks ne
fakka: Es esmu winnu pahrwar-
rejs/ un manni Prettimeeki pree-
zajahs/ ka es schaubohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es zerreju us tavvu
Schehlastibu / manna Sirđs
libgsnuojahs eeksch tawas Pesti-
schanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es dseedaschu tam KUN-
GAM/ ka winnsch labbu pee man-
ni darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XIV. Dseesma.
Irr weena Guhdsechana / ka wissu Zilweku
Dabba famaitata : 2/ 3. Kurru Starpâ
zitti ka Gekki fawa besdeewigâ Buhscha-
nâ pastahwigi valeek : 1. Un tohs Deewa-
bihjigus wasa : 4. Bet zitti turrahâ pee
tahs Pestischanas no Zianas/ tas irr / pee
Kristus/ un tohs ar Preeku ispestiti : 7.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "EenaDahwida (Dsees-
ima) preeksch ta augsta
Dseedataja. Tee Gekki
fakka fawâ Sirđi: Deewa ne-
waid/ tee irr maitafschees un fa-
gahniifschees ar fawu Darbu/ ne-
weena newaid/ kas labbi darra.
2. Tas KUNGS skattahs
no Debbes us teem Zilweku
Behrneem/ raundsht / arrt jelle
tas faprattigs buhtu/ kas Dee-
wu mekletu.
3. Bet tee irr wiffi atkahpu-
schees/ wifsnotnx irr finirdoscht
tappuschi/ neweens irr kas labbi
darra/ ir ne weens weenigs.
4. Woj tad teem Launadar-
ritajeem ne irr nekahda Atsib-
tchana/ kas mannis Laudis ehd/
(itt) ka tee Maist ehstu/ bet to
KUNGU tee ne peefanz.
5. Tur tee ar Bihjaschanii
"
    }
  ],

  "notes": ""
